steps.title: Interpret the function notation F(5) = 30
steps.content: In the context of F(m) = 6m, the statement F(5) = 30 means we are evaluating the function at $m = 5$ kilograms. The result is 30 newtons. In context: the input is mass 5 kg, and the output is force 30 N.

steps.title: Match the interpretation to the correct choice
steps.content:
We established that when the mass is 5 kilograms, the force is 30 newtons.

Looking at the choices, choice A (‘The estimated force acting on an object with a mass of 5 kilograms is 30 newtons.’) states: The estimated force acting on an object with a mass of 5 kilograms is 30 newtons. This exactly matches our interpretation.

That confirms A is correct.
